_schema.description: Price table for Claude models. Seeded from the Anthropic pricing page. Add rows when prices change — never delete old rows so historical events keep their historical cost.

fields.model: Model identifier as it appears in Claude Code JSONL logs (message.model field)
fields.effective_date: YYYY-MM-DD. The pricing engine picks the row with the latest effective_date <= event timestamp.
fields.cache_write_per_mtok: USD per million cache-creation tokens (cache_creation_input_tokens in logs)
fields.cache_read_per_mtok: USD per million cache-read tokens (cache_read_input_tokens in logs)
fields.verify_before_trusting: If true, this row was seeded at scaffold time and must be verified against the Anthropic pricing page before relying on it for accurate costs

_schema.pricing_note: The four token classes have very different prices. cache_read is ~10% of input price; cache_write is ~125% of input price. A cache-heavy Claude Code session will be costed very wrong if you sum raw tokens. This engine prices each class separately — that is the whole point.
